title: Skip PlaceBlock at bot's current position (no reference block)
description:
The agent tries to place blocks at its own position where no solid reference block exists. PlaceBlock requires an adjacent solid face. Filter positions matching bot's current location from the build plan.

Evidence: PlaceBlock at (-236,66,173) - same as bot position - with error 'no solid reference block'

Source: Live production log 2026-06-25
